# IceSoak

> IceSoak is a factual directory of cold plunge, sauna, and contrast-therapy
> studios in the United States. Every studio listing includes available
> modalities, location, and a last-verified date. Guides answer common recovery
> questions using real temperatures, durations, and evidence — no marketing
> language.

Primary site: https://icesoak.com
Launch coverage: Denver (CO), Dallas–Fort Worth (TX), and Philadelphia (PA).

## How listings work
- Directory pages are published only when backed by at least three verified
  studios; thinner pages are marked noindex until coverage grows.
- Studio facts (modalities, temperatures, prices) are shown only when known;
  unknown fields are omitted rather than guessed.

## Key sections
- Cold plunge by metro: https://icesoak.com/cold-plunge/denver/
- Sauna by metro: https://icesoak.com/sauna/dallas-fort-worth/
- Infrared sauna by metro: https://icesoak.com/infrared-sauna/dallas-fort-worth/
- Contrast therapy by metro: https://icesoak.com/contrast-therapy/denver/
- Guides index: https://icesoak.com/guides/

## Reference guides
- How cold should a cold plunge be: https://icesoak.com/guides/how-cold-should-a-cold-plunge-be/
- How long to cold plunge: https://icesoak.com/guides/how-long-to-cold-plunge/
- Cold plunge benefits: https://icesoak.com/guides/cold-plunge-benefits/
- Is cold plunging safe: https://icesoak.com/guides/is-cold-plunge-safe/
- Cold plunge vs sauna: https://icesoak.com/guides/cold-plunge-vs-sauna/
- Cold plunge vs ice bath: https://icesoak.com/cold-plunge-vs-ice-bath/
- Infrared vs traditional sauna: https://icesoak.com/infrared-vs-traditional-sauna/

## Sitemaps
- Sitemap index: https://icesoak.com/sitemap_index.xml
